installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && pnpm run build:web

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https://slabplan-api-production.up.railway.app https://slabplan-api-staging.up.railway.app https://*.sentry.io https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.ingest.us.sentry.io wss: ws: blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
